title: koeleria cristata subsp. pseudocristata
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. pseudocristata, also known as a grass species, is a type of plant in the grass family (Poaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Koeleria cristata subsp. pseudocristata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
